Package lu.kbra.pclib.logger

Class PCLogger

java.lang.Object
lu.kbra.pclib.logger.PCLogger
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable
@Deprecated public class PCLogger extends Object implements Closeable
Deprecated.
use a dedicated library like SLF4J instead

  • Constructor Details

    • PCLogger

      @Deprecated public PCLogger(File file) throws IOException
      Deprecated.
      Parameters:
      file - The file to load the configuration from, uses the default configuration if null. Use #exportDefaultConfig(File) to export the default configuration.
      Throws:
      IOException
